nasb.text: Mountains quake because of Him And the hills dissolve; Indeed the earth is upheaved by His presence, The world and all the inhabitants in it.

esv.text: The mountains quake before him; the hills melt; the earth heaves before him, the world and all who dwell in it.

cnv.text: 大山在他面前震動， 小山也都融化； 大地在他面前廢去， 世界和所有住在世上的，也都這樣。

ccb.text: 在祂面前，群山震动，丘陵消融。 在祂面前，大地隆起， 世界和世上的一切都战栗。
